name: Faux Leather 5 Slot Desktop Organizer - Threshold™
description:
Maintain a neat, organized space with the Faux Leather 5-Slot Desktop Organizer from Threshold™. This desktop organizer is designed in a rectangular shape with multiple compartments to help provide ample space for your notepads, scissors, and other essentials. Made of faux leather, this organizer makes a practical addition to your workspace or study area.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
